title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
summary_full: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.
summary_public: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran
